roles.name: financial_analyst
roles.objective: Inspect revenue, refund, and margin signals.

roles.name: technical_analyst
roles.objective: Inspect graph dependencies that affect billing risk.

roles.name: risk_analyst
roles.objective: Check high-severity insights and human-review triggers.

artifacts.title: Revenue leakage concentrated in refunds
artifacts.summary: Refund amount and support escalation categories point to onboarding delays as the highest-confidence loss signal.

artifacts.title: Billing migration depends on LegacyAuth
artifacts.summary: The graph indicates that LegacyAuth remains connected to billing and rollback risk.

artifacts.title: Critical technical risk requires human review
artifacts.summary: The judge should require platform and finance review before final approval.

judge_interventions.message: Critical LegacyAuth dependency is linked to a proposed billing decision.
Marketing ROI finding is useful but below high-confidence threshold.
